modules.name: Learn
modules.title: Subjunctive Lessons
modules.instructions: Master the subjunctive mood for expressing wishes, demands, suggestions, and hypothetical situations using were, base verbs, and special structures.

modules.name: Write
modules.title: Subjunctive Writing
modules.instructions: Write sentences using different subjunctive structures to express various degrees of unreality, formality, and hypothetical situations.

modules.name: Play
modules.title: Subjunctive Games
modules.instructions: Play games to practice identifying and forming subjunctive structures in different contexts.

modules.name: Quiz
modules.title: Subjunctive Quiz
modules.instructions: Test your knowledge of subjunctive forms, usage, and the differences between subjunctive and indicative moods.

modules.name: Apply
modules.title: Subjunctive Challenge
modules.instructions: Apply subjunctive structures correctly in formal writing, suggestions, and complex hypothetical situations.
